root.name: Change the French title text color from white to gold on slide 4
root.description: Evaluates if the agent successfully changed the French title text color from white to gold on slide 4, without making extraneous changes to the presentation.

children.name: Correct French title color change on slide 4
children.description: Checks that the French title text on slide 4 has been changed from white to gold.

children.name: No extraneous changes made to other slides and elements
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes (text, color, formatting, slides, transitions, animations, notes) were made to other slides.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Check ppt_diff for extraneous changes
    # Acceptable change: text color of French title on slide 4
    # All other diffs should be empty
    ok = True
    reasons = []
    # Slides
    if ppt_diff.added_slides or ppt_diff.removed_slides:
        ok = False
        reasons.append("Slides were added/removed.")
    if len(ppt_diff.modified_slides) > 1:
        ok = False
        reasons.append("Multiple slides were modified.")
    # Transitions/animations
    if ppt_diff.added_animations or ppt_diff.removed_animations or ppt_diff.modified_animations:
        ok = False
        reasons.append("Animations were added/removed/modified.")
    if ppt_diff.added_transitions or ppt_diff.removed_transitions or ppt_diff.modified_transitions:
        ok = False
        reasons.append("Transitions were added/removed/modified.")
    # Notes
    # Notes should not be changed except for slide 4 (if title was changed)
    # We'll check modified_notes on slide 4 only
    # For text/element formatting changes: We'll check all slides except slide 4
    # Use python-pptx to compare all slide contents except slide 4
    from pptx import Presentation
    prs_orig = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    prs_mod = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    orig_slide_count = len(prs_orig.slides)
    mod_slide_count = len(prs_mod.slides)
    if orig_slide_count != mod_slide_count:
        ok = False
        reasons.append("Slide count changed.")
    if ok:
        return "No extraneous changes detected.", 1.0
    else:
        return "; ".join(reasons), 0.0

children.name: No extraneous changes on slide 4
children.description: Checks that no extraneous changes were made to slide 4 beyond the French title text color change.

metadata.task: Change the French title text color from white to gold on slide 4
